hypothesis: Incorporating a 3D conformation-aware pharmacophore overlap term (computed from aligned low-energy conformers) into the RL reward will at least double the hit rate (IC50 ≤ 1 µM in ERα binding assays) among the top 100 generated molecules relative to the current CATS-based reward, while preserving novelty (median Tanimoto to any reference ≤ 0.35; median MAP4 ≤ 0.04) and drug-likeness (median QED ≥ 0.5).
